homepage.name: PRIYANSH
homepage.subheading: Data Science | Generative AI & Agentic AI | AI/ML

about.intro: Skilled in Generative AI, Agentic AI, RAG pipelines and deep learning — with 3 internships delivering AI/ML systems across DataScience and Python backend domains, including hands-on experience working on PwC’s Project NTH (Navigation Tax Hub).Driven to engineer intelligent, scalable solutions with clean efficient code.
highlights: Skilled in Generative AI, Agentic AI, RAG pipelines, and deep learning

projects.title: Image Captioning and Segmentation System
projects.description: Developed an end-to-end image captioning pipeline using a ResNet-50 encoder and LSTM-based decoder trained on Flickr8K images, achieving a BLEU score of 0.7 — demonstrating strong caption coherence and context-awareness. Implemented semantic image segmentation using DeepLabV3 with ResNet-50 backbone for pixel-level object classification, enhancing the system's visual understanding capabilities.

projects.title: Personalised Healthcare Recommendation System
projects.description: Built a personalized healthcare recommendation system leveraging machine learning and data-driven insights to suggest medicines, lifestyle changes, and treatment plans. Engineered a multi-model recommendation engine combining classification models, feature engineering, and health data analysis for personalized medical suggestions. Designed an end-to-end pipeline integrating backend APIs and interactive interfaces to deliver real-time, explainable healthcare recommendations. Addressed healthcare decision complexity by transforming patient data into actionable insights for improved diagnosis and preventive care.

projects.title: NLP Duplicate Question Pairs
projects.description: Developed a machine learning model to identify duplicate questions using TF-IDF vectorization and similarity metrics. Engineered feature extraction techniques including cosine similarity and semantic overlap to improve detection accuracy. Optimized model performance for large-scale datasets, enabling efficient question deduplication.

projects.title: Patient Management System
projects.description: Designed a patient management system to handle medical records, appointments, and treatment history with secure database integration. Implemented backend APIs for efficient data retrieval and updates, ensuring reliability in healthcare workflows. Structured relational database schemas to maintain consistency and integrity of patient information.

projects.title: AI Chatbot with Sentiment Analysis
projects.description: Built an intelligent chatbot integrated with sentiment analysis to classify user emotions and adapt responses dynamically. Implemented NLP pipelines including tokenization, vectorization, and classification models to improve conversational accuracy. Enhanced user interaction by enabling emotion-aware responses, improving engagement and contextual relevance.

projects.title: Expense Tracker
projects.description:
Developed a full-stack expense tracking system enabling users to record, update, and analyze financial transactions with persistent MySQL storage.
Built RESTful APIs using FastAPI to support CRUD operations, ensuring efficient data handling and scalability.
Designed an interactive frontend interface for real-time expense visualization and efficient financial management.

projects.title: Insurance Premium Prediction
projects.description: Developed a machine learning model to predict health insurance premiums based on user attributes such as age, BMI, smoking habits, and dependents. Applied end-to-end ML workflow including data preprocessing, feature engineering, model training, and evaluation using regression algorithms. Compared multiple models including Linear Regression, Random Forest, and Gradient Boosting to optimize prediction accuracy and performance. Built a predictive system enabling users to estimate insurance costs, supporting better financial and healthcare planning decisions.

projects.title: Agentic RAG Chatbot and Blog Generation System
projects.description:
Built an agentic AI system integrating a RAG-based chatbot with dynamic tool usage (web search, calculator, APIs) for context-aware and accurate responses.
Designed a multi-agent architecture enabling intelligent decision-making for tool selection, retrieval, and response generation.
Developed an LLM-powered blog generation agent with multiple writing modes for structured, high-quality content creation.
Implemented persistent memory and context management to support coherent multi-turn conversations and long-term interaction handling.

highlights: Resolved 40+ bugs on PwC's Navigation Tax Hub (NTH) — accelerating system stability and cutting time-to production-readiness by eliminating errors across release pipelines, built automated test cases for python based backend services.
Developed and deployed an AI-powered voice chatbot from scratch using Python backend services with integrated speech-to-text inference, enabling seamless voice-driven interactions for end users.
Led the development of a Task Management System, built 30+ RESTful CRUD APIs, user authentication and tracking protocols and designing the complete database schema using PostgreSQL.

Worked on development of a RAG-based AI chatbot with personalized recommendation system using LLMs, NLP, and DL algorithms, contributed in achieving 92% retrieval accuracy and enabling context-aware, personalized user interactions.
Engineered features on a 80K-record supervised dataset using Pandas eliminating data inconsistencies across pipelines and directly improving model’s prediction accuracy and performance.
Developed automated test cases in Python and built Matplotlib-based visualizations and analytical dashboards to support model evaluation, performance monitoring.
Developed a healthcare recommendation model for disease prediction, suggesting medicine accordingly with future risk and generating a daily routine for exercise with diet plan.
Achieved 84% training accuracy on prediction models using feature engineering, NLP and Deep Learning techniques.

certificates.title: Generative AI Foundations
certificates.description: Industry-focused training program on Generative AI, covering core concepts such as large language models (LLMs), transformer architectures, and prompt engineering techniques. Gained practical insights into building and deploying AI-powered applications using AWS services, along with understanding ethical AI considerations and real-world business use cases.

certificates.title: Data Science and AI
certificates.description: Developed strong proficiency in data analysis and manipulation using Python. Worked extensively with libraries such as NumPy, Pandas, and Matplotlib for data cleaning, exploration, and visualization. Applied statistical techniques and basic machine learning concepts to solve real-world data problems, strengthening analytical and problem-solving skills.

certificates.title: TCS iON Career Edge – Young Professional
certificates.description: Completed a comprehensive career development program focused on enhancing professional and interpersonal skills. Gained expertise in communication, presentation, resume writing, group discussions, and interview techniques. Also covered business etiquette, effective email and telephone communication, along with foundational knowledge of IT and artificial intelligence concepts to prepare for corporate environments.
